song.title: Savior I by Faith Am Touching
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Savior, I by faith am touching Thee, the source of every good; Virtue now, by faith am claiming, Through the cleansing of Thy blood.
[C] Chorus Touching Thee, new life is glowing By Thy Spirit’s burning flame; Cleansing, purging, Spirit-filling, Glory to Thy Holy Name!
[V2] 2) Touching Thee in faith, I take Thee In Thy riches full and free; All I am I open to Thee, All Thou art Thou giv’st to me.
[V3] 3) Touching now Thine Outstretched scepter, O most mighty King of kings; Of Thy fulness now receiving, High I mount on eagle wings.
[V4] 4) Grace and virtue, strength and wisdom, All my need, by Thee supplied; Keep me touching, keep me claiming, Keep me ever at Thy side.
song.author: Bertha Fennell
